title: The Five Pennies
writer: Jack Rose, Melville Shavelson, Robert Smith
actors: Danny Kaye, Barbara Bel Geddes, Louis Armstrong
plot: Danny Kaye cuts loose with his trademark musical clowning. Louis "Satchmo" Armstrong plays his horn and croons in that famed gargling-granite voice. Big Band icons Bob Crosby, Ray Anthony and Shelly Manne join the fun.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 2 wins & 8 nominations total
